summary: Impact zoom-punch scale pop text effect component for Remotion.

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/title-zoom-punch/src/TitleZoomPunch.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `TitleZoomPunch` and `titleZoomPunchDefaultProps`, then register the `TitleZoomPunch` composition with duration 120, fps 30, width 1920, and height 1080.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Title Zoom Punch Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/title-zoom-punch to my project. Preserve the exported TitleZoomPunchProps API and register the TitleZoomPunch composition with the default props.
